title: Venturecraft
description: Get ready for a new Adventure!
body:
# Welcome to Venturecraft!
**Are you ready for a new adventure?**

> This has been a passion project of mine on and off for a while. With over 230 mods, handpicked, configured, and tested to create a cohesive modded experience. I aim to expand upon almost every part of the game, with my main focus on exploration and building, while keeping with the spirit of Minecraft. Hopefully this pack will be a great start to many modded Minecraft adventures!

**Worldgen:**
> See the sights with countless biomes spread across overhauled terrain, and discover forgotten ruins and grand structures on your travels.

**Ambience & Visuals:**
> Immerse yourself in your surroundings with ambient particles, sounds, and visual effects, including shader options ([BSL](https://modrinth.com/shader/bsl-shaders) and [Complimentary](https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-reimagined)) to further enhance your visual experience. Witness the beauty of nature as the seasons pass in this ever changing world.

**Mobs:**
> Meet all kinds of new and exciting creatures. Study wild animals in their habitats, make helpful friends to join in your travels, and challenge dangerous foes for experience and loot.

**Combat:**
> Find your combat style with various weapons, tools, and enchantments with fun mechanics.

**Items:**
> Craft useful new tools and items to aid in your adventures. From survival essentials like backpacks and sleeping bags, to specialized adventuring gear like gliders and grapple hooks, you're bound to find something to suit your needs.

**Blocks:**
> Build and decorate your bases with a stylish selection of blocks. Whether you're looking for more wood types in a wide array of colors, more stone variants and more complete blocksets, or small decorative and functional details, you'll surely find something to inspire you!

**And so much more!**


<details>
<summary>Future Plans</summary>

With future updates, I hope to add a more personal touch and make the pack more unique.

- Eventually I might set up a Quests/Advancements/Tips system of some kind to introduce major mechanics and features ingame.

</details>

<details>
<summary>Notes</summary>

- You may customize the pack for personal playthroughs and use the pack in videos.
- Links to mods and resource packs can be found under Dependencies for each version on the Versions tab.
- You may need to change your shader settings depending on your device's performance specs. [BSL](https://modrinth.com/shader/bsl-shaders) has been tuned to have low-medium impact, while [Complimentary](https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-reimagined) has heavier settings enabled.
- Other shaders may not work with the [Nicer Skies](https://modrinth.com/mod/nicer-skies) or [Euphoria Patches](https://modrinth.com/mod/euphoria-patches) mods, so you may need to disable those if you add other shaders.
- Also be sure to change the settings for your shader's clouds and the [Better Clouds](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-clouds) mod to fit your preferences.

</details>

<details>
<summary>Thanks</summary>

- Thanks to the developers of every mod, resource, and shader in this pack for making this possible!
- Thanks to me for putting the modpack together.
- Thanks to my brother and my friends for believing in me.
- And thanks to you for reading this far and hopefully trying the pack!

</details>
